steps.text: Two figures in black, red-clouded cloaks step onto the road. One has the spinning red Sharingan.

steps.speaker: Itachi
steps.text: We have no quarrel with your squad, Commander. Step aside. We are here for the Nine-Tails.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: Over my dead body, Akatsuki! You're not taking anyone!

steps.speaker: Itachi
steps.text: ...Foolish. Then know despair. Look into my eyes — Tsukuyomi.

steps.speaker: Kakashi
steps.text: Don't meet his gaze! Watch the feet, command your squad by instinct. Go!

boss.victory_text: Itachi lowers his eyes, almost approving. 'You're stronger than he was. Good.' He steps back into the mist.
